sentences.text_original: 你怎么才来？我们等了你半个小时了。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme cái lái? Wǒmen děng le nǐ bàn ge xiǎoshí le.
sentences.text_translation: Nega endi kelyapsan? Seni yarim soat kutdik.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Почему ты только пришёл? Мы ждали тебя полчаса.
sentences.text_translation_en: Why are you only getting here now? We waited half an hour for you.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对不起！我早上睡过头了。
sentences.pinyin: Duìbuqǐ! Wǒ zǎoshang shuì guò tóu le.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你平时不是七点就起床吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ píngshí bú shì qī diǎn jiù qǐchuáng ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты же обычно встаёшь в семь?
sentences.text_translation_en: Don't you usually get up at seven?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，但是昨天晚上睡得特别晚。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, dànshì zuótiān wǎnshang shuì de tèbié wǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, lekin kecha juda kech uxladim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, но вчера вечером лёг спать очень поздно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right, but last night I went to bed really late.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What time did you go to sleep?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 两点多。在看书，忘记时间了。
sentences.pinyin: Liǎng diǎn duō. Zài kàn shū, wàngjì shíjiān le.
sentences.text_translation: Ikkidan oshganda. Kitob o'qib, vaqtni unutib qo'yibman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В начале третьего. Читал книгу и забыл о времени.
sentences.text_translation_en: A bit past two. I was reading and lost track of time.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 怪不得你迟到了。下次定个闹钟吧。
sentences.pinyin: Guàibùdé nǐ chídào le. Xià cì dìng ge nàozhōng ba.
sentences.text_translation: Shuning uchun kechikkan ekansan. Keyingi safar budilnik qo'yib qo'y.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Неудивительно, что ты опоздал. В следующий раз поставь будильник.
sentences.text_translation_en: No wonder you were late. Next time, set an alarm.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我定了，但是没听见。以后早点睡。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ dìng le, dànshì méi tīngjiàn. Yǐhòu zǎo diǎn shuì.
sentences.text_translation: Qo'ygandim, lekin eshitmabman. Bundan keyin erta uxlayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я ставил, но не услышал. Впредь буду ложиться пораньше.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did, but I didn't hear it. I'll go to bed earlier from now on.
sentences.speaker: B
